data.name: Share results
data.customCode:
def custom_code(active_process: ActiveProcess) -> None:
    # The following variables are Django QuerySet objects related to the active process
    applicationnotes = active_process.applicationnotes # Do not change this line
    loanapplications = active_process.loanapplications # Do not change this line
    applicants = active_process.applicants # Do not change this line
    documents = active_process.documents # Do not change this line

    loan_application = loanapplications.first()
    if loan_application is None:
        return
    applicant = applicants.first()
    if applicant is None:
        return

    outcome = "approved" if loan_application.approved else "denied"

    print(f"Sending decision email to {applicant.email}: Your loan application has been {outcome}", flush=True)

methods.name: approve
methods.description: Approves the loanapplication by setting approved to true and saving it

data.name: Perform risk analysis
data.customCode:
def custom_code(active_process: ActiveProcess) -> None:
    # The following variables are Django QuerySet objects related to the active process
    applicationnotes = active_process.applicationnotes # Do not change this line
    applicants = active_process.applicants # Do not change this line
    loanapplications = active_process.loanapplications # Do not change this line
    documents = active_process.documents # Do not change this line
    
    loan_application = loanapplications.first()
    if loan_application is None:
        return

    import random
    risks = ['low', 'medium', 'high']
    random_risk = random.choice(risks)
    print(f'This loan application risk level is: {random_risk}', flush=True)
    loan_application.risk = random_risk
    loan_application.save()
